nasb.text: But to the others He said in my hearing, “Go through the city after him and strike; do not let your eye have pity and do not spare.

esv.text: And to the others he said in my hearing, “Pass through the city after him, and strike. Your eye shall not spare, and you shall show no pity.

cnv.text: 我又聽見他對其餘的人說：“你們要跟隨他走遍那城，進行殺戮；你們的眼不要顧惜，你們也不要憐恤。

ccb.text: 我听见祂对其余的人说：“你们要跟随他走遍全城，毫不留情地杀戮，
